name: itables-for-vscode
description: Automatically initializes ITables in VS Code Jupyter notebooks so DataFrames render as interactive tables.

commands.title: ITables: Install In Active Notebook Kernel

itablesForVscode.enableAutoInit.description: Automatically run the itables initialization snippet for each Python Jupyter notebook session.

itablesForVscode.initSnippet.description: Python snippet executed in the notebook kernel to initialize itables.
